title: Sonic the Hedgehog
edition_pinned: Sonic The Hedgehog Steam app 71113 (2010 Genesis re-release; now delisted), observed 2026-07-13; row describes the 1991 Genesis/Mega Drive Sonic the Hedgehog design.
moat: Slope momentum and recoverable rings turn route reading into a wager between speed and safety.
scope_efficiency_hypothesis: One momentum model lets the same terrain support cautious traversal, speed routes, secrets, and score chase.
exemplar_rationale: Defines speed-platforming through terrain-shaped momentum rather than a separate sprint system.

evidence.claim: Steam appdetails genres field for the direct Sonic The Hedgehog re-release listed: Action; Adventure.
